command:
cd /tmp/moreno-ai-setup

echo "=== INSPECT homelab-agent ==="
ls agents/homelab-agent/ 2>/dev/null || echo "not found"

echo ""
echo "=== --show sakura --json (partial) ==="
python3 runtime/agent_identity_loader.py --repo . --show sakura --json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
print('schema_version:', d['schema_version'])
print('agent_version:', d['agent_version'])
print('department:', d['agent']['department'])
print('immutable_traits:', d['personality']['immutable_traits'][:2])
print('voice.tone:', d['voice']['tone'][:50])
print('relationships:', [r['target'] for r in d['relationships']['entries']])
print('memory.status:', d['memory']['status'])
print('governance.subordinate_to:', d['governance']['subordinate_to'])
print('validation.passed:', d['validation']['passed'])
"

echo ""
echo "=== GIT COMMIT ==="
git add runtime/
git status --short

git commit -m "Phase 9E.1 Agent Identity Runtime — loader implemented and validated"
git tag Phase9E1-AgentIdentityRuntime

git push origin main && git push origin Phase9E1-AgentIdentityRuntime
git push github main && git push github Phase9E1-AgentIdentityRuntime

echo ""
echo "=== LOG ==="
git log --oneline -4
git tag -l | tail -6
